description: Interacts with a Supabase database. Can insert, update, select, or delete rows from tables.

requiredFields.label: Table Name
requiredFields.description: The name of the Supabase table to operate on

optionalFields.label: Filters
optionalFields.description: JSON object with column:value pairs for filtering, e.g. {"status": "active"}

optionalFields.label: Columns
optionalFields.description: Comma-separated column names to select (for select operation)

optionalFields.label: Limit
optionalFields.description: Maximum number of rows to return

outputs.label: Result Data
outputs.description: The rows returned or affected by the operation

outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Supabase error object if the operation failed
